indication: Lynparza is indicated as monotherapy for the treatment of adult patients with metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC) and BRCA1/2-mutations (germline and/or somatic) who have progressed following prior therapy that included a new hormonal agent.
description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized olaparib as a monotherapy for the treatment of adult patients with metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC) and BRCA1/2-mutations (germline and/or somatic) who have progressed following prior therapy that included a new hormonal agent.

document.name: Lynparza (olaparib) [product information]. EMA.
document.description: AstraZeneca AB. Lynparza (olaparib) [product information]. European Medicines Agency website. https://www.ema.europa.eu/en/documents/product-information/lynparza-epar-product-information_en.pdf. Revised August 2024. Accessed August 25, 2024.
